narrative:
Precinct Butler And Castine Village (precinct in Darke County) has 838 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.8 percentage points.
